charcoal-press.$description: Charcoal Press — Primary text, body copy, filled buttons, hairline borders — the dominant ink of the system

bone-white.$description: Bone White — Page canvas, secondary surface fill behind content sections

paper-white.$description: Paper White — Card surfaces, white-space inside pastel cards, icon contrast against dark fills

silver-rule.$description: Silver Rule — Hairline dividers, subtle structural borders between dense sections

vermillion-mark.$description: Vermillion Mark — Orange accent for outlined action borders, linked labels, and lightweight interactive emphasis. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

sage-panel.$description: Sage Panel — Feature card background — muted olive-green panel for storytelling sections like environmental impact

periwinkle-panel.$description: Periwinkle Panel — Feature card background — dusty blue panel for collection-overview sections

blush-panel.$description: Blush Panel — Feature card background — soft lilac-pink panel for rarity/utility sections

peach-headline.$description: Peach Headline — Accent on display headlines, decorative borders within heading contexts — warm cream tint that sits between the ink and the pastel cards

migra.$description: Display and editorial headlines only. The custom serif brings fashion-magazine authority: weight 500 (medium) avoids the heavy black-serif cliché and keeps the type feeling like ink on paper rather than poster art. Used at 64px for section openers and stretched to 187px for hero statements with line-height 1.0 — the tight setting lets oversized serifs lock into compositional blocks. Italic within upright passages (e.g. 'blockchain', 'rare', 'matters') creates editorial cadence without leaving the family.

inter.$description: All running text: body copy at 16px/400, card descriptions at 14px, sub-headings and emphasized text at 20–24px. Light weight 300 used for de-emphasized text, medium 500 for inline emphasis and button labels. The letter-spacing of ~0.079em (relative) adds breathing room that complements the dense spacing grid without feeling loose. Inter's geometric neutrality keeps the focus on the serif display moments.

arial.$description: System fallback for icon-adjacent micro-labels and button secondary text where a sans-serif system reference is acceptable

bone-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Page background — warm off-white that feels like paper stock

paper-card.$description: Surface level 1: White surface inside pastel panels for readable text

pastel-feature-card.$description: Surface level 2: Blush/lilac tinted card for feature storytelling

pastel-feature-card-alt.$description: Surface level 2: Periwinkle tinted card for collection overview

pastel-feature-card-alt-2.$description: Surface level 2: Sage tinted card for mission/impact sections
